stemHtml: Redundancy in flight controls can be achieved by…

options.a: fixing dual control runs to each other combined with one actuator per control surface with a separate power supply.
options.b: fixing both control columns to each other so that increased force can be exerted by both pilots.
options.c: clutches with dual control runs, multiple actuators per control surface, and multiple control surfaces per axis.
options.d: proper rigging of the flight control surfaces during maintenance.
